tagline.zh: 一个正在学习代码、建模与化工专业知识的学生
tagline.en: a student exploring code, modeling and chemistry

highlights.zhDesc: GPA 3.60，班级第 1，专业第 2，获得校级综合荣誉。
highlights.enDesc: GPA 3.60, ranked 1st in class and 2nd in major with university-level honors.

highlights.zhDesc: 全国大学生数学建模竞赛江苏省一等奖，具备完整建模流程意识。
highlights.enDesc: CUMCM Provincial First Prize, demonstrating complete modeling workflow proficiency.

highlights.zhDesc: 连续获得 2025、2026 年美国大学生数学建模竞赛 MCM/ICM H 奖。
highlights.enDesc: Consecutive MCM/ICM Honorable Mentions in 2025 and 2026.

highlights.zhDesc: 担任学习委员与教学信息员，参与志愿服务、辩论赛与排球赛事组织。
highlights.enDesc: Class officer, debate competition runner-up, and volleyball event organizer.

competitions.zh: 美国大学生数学建模竞赛 MCM/ICM H 奖
美国大学生数学建模竞赛 MCM/ICM H 奖
全国大学生数学建模竞赛 江苏省一等奖
第二十二届江苏省高等数学竞赛 本科一级 A 类三等奖
MathorCup 高校数学建模挑战赛 区域赛二等奖
competitions.en: MathorCup Math Modeling Challenge, Regional 2nd Prize

competitions.zh: 第 37 届中国化学奥林匹克竞赛 江苏赛区二等奖
大学生学科竞赛先进个人
白马校区第一届排球新生杯 亚军
competitions.en: Baima Campus Freshman Volleyball Cup, Runner-up

competitions.zh: 材料院辩论赛新生杯 亚军

skills.zhDesc: 熟悉有机化学机理与林产化工基础。
skills.enDesc: Organic chemistry mechanisms and chemical engineering fundamentals.

skills.zhDesc: 熟悉数学建模、文档写作与结果可视化。
skills.enDesc: Mathematical modeling, scientific writing, and data visualization.

skills.zhDesc: 掌握前端基础，持续学习 AI 辅助开发流程。
skills.enDesc: Frontend fundamentals and AI-assisted development workflows.

skills.zhDesc: 熟悉常用办公、绘图、仿真与文献管理工具。
skills.enDesc: Office, drawing, simulation, and reference management tools.

projects.zhDesc: 围绕实际问题完成模型构建、数据处理、结果分析与论文撰写，参与全国大学生数学建模竞赛、MCM/ICM 等赛事，并取得省级与国际级奖项。
projects.enDesc: Applied model construction, data processing, result analysis, and paper writing to real-world problems across CUMCM and MCM/ICM competitions, earning provincial and international awards.
projects.zhAbilities: 问题抽象、模型假设、数据分析、论文表达
projects.enAbilities: Problem abstraction, model assumption, data analysis, paper writing

projects.zh: AI 辅助科研学习与知识管理
projects.zhDesc: 探索使用 AI 工具、Zotero、Obsidian、Markdown 与 LaTeX 进行文献阅读、知识整理、学习路径规划与科研表达辅助。
projects.enDesc: Exploring AI tools, Zotero, Obsidian, Markdown, and LaTeX for literature reading, knowledge organization, learning path planning, and research writing assistance.
projects.zhAbilities: 文献管理、知识组织、科研表达、学习复盘
projects.enAbilities: Reference management, knowledge organization, research communication, learning reflection
projects.zhTodo: Obsidian 知识库截图、文献笔记样例、工作流说明
projects.enTodo: Obsidian vault screenshots, reading note samples, workflow documentation

projects.zhDesc: 基于 Astro 构建中英双语个人学术主页，包含组件化布局、暗色模式、语言自动切换、响应式设计、打印样式与 GitHub Actions 自动部署。
projects.enDesc: Built a bilingual personal academic homepage with Astro, featuring component-based layout, dark mode, language auto-switching, print styles, and GitHub Actions auto-deployment.
projects.zhAbilities: 组件化架构、响应式页面、静态部署、信息架构、隐私分版、CI/CD
projects.enAbilities: Component architecture, responsive design, static deployment, information architecture, privacy-aware versioning, CI/CD

experience.zhDesc: 负责课程作业收发、学习事务协调，并配合任课教师开展教学相关工作。
experience.enDesc: Responsible for assignment collection and distribution, academic affairs coordination, and supporting course instructors.

experience.zhDesc: 负责教学信息传达、课程反馈收集与师生沟通。
experience.enDesc: Responsible for communicating teaching information, collecting course feedback, and facilitating student-teacher communication.

volunteer.zh: 2024 年 白马校区第一届排球新生杯第一组织责任人
volunteer.en: 2024: Primary organizer of the 1st Baima Campus Freshman Volleyball Cup

volunteer.zh: 2025 年 参与材料院'纸牌搭屋'志愿服务活动
volunteer.en: 2025: Participated in the 'Card House' volunteer service activity

volunteer.zh: 2025 年 参与红十字会无偿献血活动
volunteer.en: 2025: Participated in the Red Cross voluntary blood donation activity
